'''âp-j-g-sh''' ('''kapajgeshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rue|rue]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-j-g-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rue|rue]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-j-g-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kapajgeshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipajgeshoko|thipajgeshoko]] || [[word:jipajgeshoko|jipajgeshoko]] || [[word:shipajgeshoko|shipajgeshoko]] || [[word:kipajgeshoko|kipajgeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupajgeshoko|thuthupajgeshoko]] || [[word:jujupajgeshoko|jujupajgeshoko]] || [[word:shushupajgeshoko|shushupajgeshoko]] || [[word:kukupajgeshoko|kukupajgeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupajgeshoko|thupajgeshoko]] || [[word:jupajgeshoko|jupajgeshoko]] || [[word:shupajgeshoko|shupajgeshoko]] || [[word:kupajgeshoko|kupajgeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupajgeshoko|thupajgeshoko]] || [[word:jupajgeshoko|jupajgeshoko]] || [[word:shupajgeshoko|shupajgeshoko]] || [[word:kupajgeshoko|kupajgeshoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopajgeshoko|thothopajgeshoko]] || [[word:jojopajgeshoko|jojopajgeshoko]] || [[word:shoshopajgeshoko|shoshopajgeshoko]] || [[word:kokopajgeshoko|kokopajgeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopajgeshoko|thopajgeshoko]] || [[word:jopajgeshoko|jopajgeshoko]] || [[word:shopajgeshoko|shopajgeshoko]] || [[word:kopajgeshoko|kopajgeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopajgeshoko|thopajgeshoko]] || [[word:jopajgeshoko|jopajgeshoko]] || [[word:shopajgeshoko|shopajgeshoko]] || [[word:kopajgeshoko|kopajgeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpajgeshoko|thĂŠpajgeshoko]] || [[word:jĂŠpajgeshoko|jĂŠpajgeshoko]] || [[word:shĂŠpajgeshoko|shĂŠpajgeshoko]] || [[word:kĂŠpajgeshoko|kĂŠpajgeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapajgeshoko|thathapajgeshoko]] || [[word:jajapajgeshoko|jajapajgeshoko]] || [[word:shashapajgeshoko|shashapajgeshoko]] || [[word:kakapajgeshoko|kakapajgeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapajgeshoko|thapajgeshoko]] || [[word:japajgeshoko|japajgeshoko]] || [[word:shapajgeshoko|shapajgeshoko]] || [[word:kapajgeshoko|kapajgeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapajgeshoko|thapajgeshoko]] || [[word:japajgeshoko|japajgeshoko]] || [[word:shapajgeshoko|shapajgeshoko]] || [[word:kapajgeshoko|kapajgeshoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shapajgeshithi|shapajgeshithi]] || [[word:shapajgeshiji|shapajgeshiji]] || [[word:shapajgeshishi|shapajgeshishi]] || [[word:shapajgeshiki|shapajgeshiki]]
